text.title: Agency-to-Agency Referral Program Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Agency-to-Agency Referral Program output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: 8-20 entries: {agency, founder, niche, last_contact, given, received}

forbidden.pattern: roster contains peers in identical niche (competitors, not referrers)
economics_policy uses two models for the same peer concurrently
outreach_cadence skipped ≥2 consecutive quarters with no log entry

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: referral_roster populated with a typed value
economics_policy populated with a typed value
anti_poach_clause populated with a typed value
outreach_cadence populated with a typed value
annual_pruning_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
